_meta.description: Curated marketplace index for BlackVideo extensions. Updated automatically on each GitHub release by the bvx publish pipeline. Consumed as a fallback by the BlackVideo app and Centric Website when Convex is unreachable.

extensions.name: Computer Vision Tools
extensions.tagline: Object detection, tracking, and scene analysis powered by OpenCV.
extensions.description: Provides real-time object detection, motion tracking, and scene classification directly inside the BlackVideo playback stage. Integrates with VideoTheaterStage hooks to annotate video frames without affecting the source file.
extensions.author: BlackBlazent

permissions.reason: Reads video frames and current timestamp from VideoTheaterStage to run detection on active playback.

extensions.name: Video Map Space
extensions.tagline: Geographic video analysis with interactive map overlays.
extensions.description: Integrates Google Maps APIs into the BlackVideo playback stage. Synchronises map position with video timestamp, enabling geographic-based analysis of location-tagged footage.
extensions.author: Jednaz Lonestamp

permissions.reason: Reads the current video timestamp to synchronise the map marker with video playback position.
Fetches map tiles and location data from Google Maps APIs.
